# @pautena/react-design-system

AI-ready design system built on shadcn/ui with MCP support

## shadcn

### Introduction

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/shadcn-introduction--docs)

## Inputs

### DateRangeCalendar

A Date Range Calendar component that allows users to select a range of dates.

**Props:**
- `defaultValue`: `DateRange` (required) - The default date range value.

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/inputs-daterangecalendar--default)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-daterangecalendar--docs)

### DateRangePicker

DateRangePicker component allows users to select a date range.

**Props:**
- `label`: `string` (required) - The label for the date range picker.
- `defaultValue`: `DateRange` (required) - The default value for the date range picker.
- `format`: `string` (required) - The format in which the date range should be displayed.

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/inputs-daterangepicker--default)
- [Small](./?path=/story/inputs-daterangepicker--small)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-daterangepicker--docs)

- [Size Icon](./?path=/story/inputs-button--size-icon)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/inputs-button--docs)

## Containers

### ListPanel

ListPanel component renders a panel with a list of items and a content area.

**Props:**
- `defaultSelectedItem`: `string` - The ID of the item that should be selected by default.
- `items`: `ListPanelItem[]` (required) - The list of items to be displayed in the panel.
- `listMode`: `"panel" | "navigation"` - The mode of the list, either "panel" or "navigation".
- `colBreakpoint`: `number` - The breakpoint for column layout.
- `onSelectedItemChange`: `(id: string) => void` - Callback function that is called when the selected item changes.
- `children`: `React.ReactNode` - Content to display in the panel area

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/containers-listpanel--default)
- [Long](./?path=/story/containers-listpanel--long)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/containers-listpanel--docs)

### Content

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/containers-content--default)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/containers-content--docs)

## Feedback

### QueryContainer

Component to show different indicators based on the usual api query statuses

**Props:**
- `fetching`: `boolean | boolean[]` - There is a query in progress and we have available data
- `loading`: `boolean | boolean[]` - There is a query in progress and we don't have available data
- `error`: `QueryContainerError` - The query has returned an error
- `success`: `QueryContainerSuccess` - The query has finished successfully
- `children`: `React.ReactNode` - Content to display when not in loading/error/success state

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--default)
- [Fetching](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--fetching)
- [Fetching And Loading](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--fetching-and-loading)
- [Error](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--error)
- [Error With Only Message](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--error-with-only-message)
- [Success](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--success)
- [Success With Only Message](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--success-with-only-message)
- [Content](./?path=/story/feedback-querycontainer--content)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/feedback-querycontainer--docs)

### NotificationCenter

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/feedback-notificationcenter--default)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/feedback-notificationcenter--docs)

## Tables

### RemoteDataTable

A table component designed for displaying remote/server-side data with built-in pagination, sorting, and filtering capabilities. This component is fully controlled - all state (pagination, sorting, filters) must be managed by the parent component. For convenience, use the `useRemoteDataTable` hook to manage this state.

**Example:**

```tsx
const tableState = useRemoteDataTable({
  initialPagination: { pageSize: 25 }
});

<RemoteDataTable
  data={items}
  columns={columns}
  {...tableState}
  query={{
    fields: queryFields,
    filters: tableState.filters,
    onFiltersChange: tableState.onFiltersChange
  }}
/>
```

**Stories:**
- [Default](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--default)
- [Sorted By Created Date](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--sorted-by-created-date)
- [With Query Builder](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--with-query-builder)
- [Using Hook](./?path=/story/tables-remotedatatable--using-hook)

[View Documentation](./?path=/docs/tables-remotedatatable--docs)
